top_signals.title: Oil Holds Drop as Saudi Arabian Price Cut Amplifies Glut Concern
top_signals.summary: Oil held a drop on signs of growing global oversupply, with Saudi Arabia slashing prices of its main grade to Asia and maritime traffic through the Strait of Hormuz picking up.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Japan Drives Asia Offshore Bonds to Record, Surpassing China Era
top_signals.summary: Japanese borrowers drove quarterly issuance in Asia Pacific’s offshore bond market to a record, eclipsing the previous peak set during an era of Chinese corporate dominance.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Grayscale says Strategy’s recent bitcoin sales should restore confidence in its financing structure
top_signals.summary: "Strategy is selling more bitcoin. But this will restore confidence in its financing structure and help bitcoin find a more durable bottom."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: AVAX One launches CEO search after leader of its Avalanche treasury pivot steps down
top_signals.summary: SkyBridge founder Anthony Scaramucci backed AVAX One's $550 million Avalanche treasury strategy announced last year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
